# PR Summary Template

## PR Header
- PR Title: `<type(scope): short summary>`
- Linked Epic/Story/Task: `<ids>`
- Author: `<name/role>`

## What Changed
- `<change 1>`
- `<change 2>`

## Why This Change
- Problem: `<problem>`
- Expected Outcome: `<outcome>`

## Validation
- Acceptance Criteria Check:
  - [ ] `<criterion 1 met>`
  - [ ] `<criterion 2 met>`
- Tests/Checks Run:
  - `<test/check>`

## Risk and Rollback
- Risk Level: `<low/medium/high>`
- Key Risks: `<risks>`
- Rollback Plan: `<rollback steps>`

## Documentation Impact
- [ ] No doc updates needed
- [ ] Docs updated: `<file paths>`
